zh.lifeSummary: 當Roaldus de Musard Viscount of Nantes於大約1040年出生在法國時，他的父親Lord Hascouf de Musard12歲，母親Ruard d'Aboube12歲。他於1061年與Belanne de Keddington在法國諾門迪結婚。他們至少是8個兒子的父母。他去世於1132年在英國英格蘭越可爾享年93歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roaldus de Musard Viscount of Nantes于大约1040年出生在法国时，他的父亲Lord Hascouf de Musard12岁，母亲Ruard d'Aboube12岁。他于1061年与Belanne de Keddington在法国諾門迪结婚。他们至少是8个儿子的父母。他去世于1132年在英国英格兰越可爾享年93岁。

nameMeanings.name: Musard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly Durham): nickname or occupational name from Middle English mustard ‘mustard’ (Old French mostarde). The allusion could perhaps be to someone with a sharp tongue, but is probably usually to a dealer in mustard.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of the various boys' names with the first syllable Ed-, especially Edward .

variants.name: Edward
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

en.lifeSummary: When Roaldus de Musard Viscount of Nantes was born about 1040, in France, his father, Lord Hascouf de Musard, was 12 and his mother, Ruard d'Aboube, was 12. He married Belanne de Keddington in 1061, in Normandy, France. They were the parents of at least 8 sons. He died in 1132, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 93.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roaldus de Musard Viscount of Nantes est né environ 1040, à France, son père, Lord Hascouf de Musard, avait 12 ans et sa mère, Ruard d'Aboube, avait 12 ans. Il a épousé Belanne de Keddington en 1061, à Normandie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils. Il est décédé en 1132, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 93 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roaldus de Musard Viscount of Nantes um 1040 in Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord Hascouf de Musard 12 und seine Mutter Ruard d'Aboube 12. Er hat 1061 in Normandie, Frankreich Belanne de Keddington geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne. Er starb 1132 im Alter von 93 Jahren in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roaldus de Musard Viscount of Nantes è nato il circa 1040 nel Francia, il suo padre, Lord Hascouf de Musard, aveva 12 anni e il suo madre, Ruard d'Aboube, aveva 12 anni. Lui sposato Belanne de Keddington nel 1061, nel Normandie, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli. Morì nel 1132, nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 93 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Roaldus de Musard Viscount of Nantesが約1040年にフランスで生まれた時，父Lord Hascouf de Musardは12歳，母Ruard d'Aboubeは12歳であった。1061年にフランスノーマンディでBelanne de Keddingtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子の親であった。彼は1132年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアで93歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Roaldus de Musard Viscount of Nantes(이)가 대략 1040년 프랑스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord Hascouf de Musard(은)는 12세였고, 그의 어머니 Ruard d'Aboube(은)는 12세였다. 그는 1061년 프랑스 노먼디에서 Belanne de Keddington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1132년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 93세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Tideswell, Derbyshire, England: Tideswell, Deorbyscir, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roaldus de Musard Viscount of Nantes nasceu aproximadamente 1040, em França, seu pai, Lord Hascouf de Musard, tinha 12 anos e sua mãe, Ruard d'Aboube, tinha 12 anos. Ele casou-se com Belanne de Keddington em 1061, em Normandie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1132, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 93 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roaldus de Musard Viscount of Nantes родился около 1040 г. в местности Франция, его отцу по имени Lord Hascouf de Musard было 12 лет, а матери, которую звали Ruard d'Aboube, 12. Он женился на женщине по имени Belanne de Keddington в 1061 г. в местности норманди, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей. Он умер в 1132 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 93 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Roaldus de Musard Viscount of Nantes nació aproximadamente 1040, en Francia, su papá, Lord Hascouf de Musard, tenía 12 años y su mamá, Ruard d'Aboube, tenía 12 años. Se casó con Belanne de Keddington en 1061, en Normandie, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos. Murió en 1132, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 93 años.
